calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Jeffrey E. Karpel on behalf of Plaintiff Budget Truck Rental, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Junior Casey Leapaga and Moungjoi Saelee.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-40 dismissed with prejudice.
Witness Tom Garcia sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $31,248.12
Pre-Judgment Interest: $744.81
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $882.55
Total Judgment in the amount of $32,875.48
Judgment signed in open court.

Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Continued To Apr-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Oct-07-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
